name: veda-ai-assessment-creator
description: AI Assessment Creator for VedaAI Full-Stack Engineering Assignment

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
